data.title: President Trump announces a Crypto Strategic Reserve that includes XRP, SOL, and ADA
data.description:
After long weeks of waiting, US President Donald Trump has finally decided to give the crypto industry what it wants the most; a strategic crypto reserve.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-crypto-strategic-reserve-xrp-sol-ada/

data.title: In the past hour, the BTC liquidation of the entire network exceeded 60 million US dollars, and the XRP liquidation exceeded 30 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 175 million US dollars, of which BTC liquidation is 63.1079 million US dollars, XRP liquidation is 31.3510 million US dollars, SOL liquidation is 19.7715 million US dollars, ETH liquidation is 19.5037 million US dollars, and ADA liquidation is 13.0885 million US dollars.

data.title: SOL breaks through 170 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 20.65%
data.description: OKX market shows that SOL has broken through 170 USDT and is now at 170.13 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 20.65%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BTC breaks through 89,000 USDT, up 4.66% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 89,000 USDT and is now at 89,006 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 4.66%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: President Trump says crypto reserve will include SOL, XRP, and ADA
data.description:
The President's language surrounding a Bitcoin strategic reserve has shifted dramatically since his Bitcoin 2024 keynote address.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/trump-says-digital-asset-stockpile-include-sol-xrp-ada?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump directs working group to ‘move forward’ on SOL, XRP, and ADA Crypto Strategic Reserve
data.description:
The announcement notably excludes Bitcoin, which the federal government already holds $17 billion worth.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/344092/trump-directs-working-group-to-move-forward-on-sol-xrp-and-ada-crypto-strategic-reserve?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Polymarket predicts that the probability of Solana ETF being approved this year is currently 85%.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the prediction market Polymarket data, the probability of Solana ETF being approved in 2025 is now 85%, and the total trading volume of this prediction is currently $88,177.
The probability of Solana ETF being approved before July 31, 2025 is now 34%, and the total trading volume of this prediction is currently $234,560.

data.title: Hyperliquid users who were 50x long on ETH have all had their long positions liquidated and taken profits
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ai Yi, all 88,510 ETH long positions of 50x long users on Hyperliquid have been liquidated and profit-taken, and are now starting to take profit in Bitcoin, with 315 BTC left.

data.title: The whale who built a position in TRUMP at an average price of $13.07 recharged 400,000 TRUMP to Binance five minutes ago, and will make a profit of $344,000 by selling it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an on-chain analyst, the whale who built a position of $5.23 million in TRUMP at an average price of $13.07 four days ago recharged 400,000 TRUMP to Binance five minutes ago, worth $5.57 million. If sold, he would make a profit of $344,000.

data.title: TRUMP briefly broke through 15 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 12.35%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market data shows that TRUMP rose briefly above 15 USDT and is now trading at 14.7 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 12.35%.
